blocks.text: 🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold & Abrahamsen fly the flag in Flanders
The story of the week starts Wednesday: Magnus Carlsen opens his FIDE Candidates Tournament campaign, hunting the World Chess Championship challenger spot. Block the calendar.
♟️ Wed — Carlsen vs. the world: FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026, Round 1 ★
